description: Canonical list of Vercel team projects used for auto-promote. Keep .github/workflows/vercel-promote-on-merge.yaml matrix in sync. Paperwork Labs Vercel apps: path under apps/ and production domain for automation and runbooks.
repositoryVariableNaming: Optional GitHub Actions repository variable VERCEL_PROJECT_ID_<SLUG> overrides matrix.project_id (slug uppercased, hyphens → underscores).

apps.notes: Studio / paperworklabs.com — there is no separate Vercel project named paperworklabs; this app is the parent marketing/admin surface.

Canonical AxiomFolio — owns axiomfolio.com + www.axiomfolio.com (verified). Originally a Vite project; PATCHed in-place to Next.js on 2026-04-28 (framework + root + install + output) by scripts/vercel-cutover-axiomfolio.mjs. The temporary 'axiomfolio-next' project (prj_z3JVQGLLfsJO2QZJnK5BvMjfFoK3) was never used and has been deleted.
Storybook static site; build via pnpm --filter @paperwork-labs/design build-storybook. Set projectId after vercel link / project creation (see docs/infra/FOUNDER_ACTIONS.md).
Optional future team project if Clerk Account Portal is mirrored on Vercel; no apps/accounts in this repo today (Clerk-hosted primary host). Matrix row skips until a real prj_… exists.

notOnVercel.name: brain-api
notOnVercel.notes: Brain API is deployed on Render (apis/brain), not Vercel — excluded from auto-promote matrix.
